title: LRC - JUIT
content: Expert Services Research Support It provides  information about various research tools such as Sodhganga, Digital Library,  Institutional Repositories, JUIT Publication Database, Database Searching,  Creating Bibliography, Citation Studies, Fellowship / Scholarship Information, Research  Funding or Award Information. Books (Print): Library has  reference books in the library which contain high quality research contents in  different areas of learning. A separate section is allocated to keep these  reference books in the library. Journals (Print): The  Library has been spending a huge amount on subscribing many national and  international peer-reviewed journals for the users of different subject areas.  The current issues of these journals are being displayed at entrance of the  library whereas back volumes are available in the -2 floor of the library. DL@JUIT (Institutional Repository) : Digital Library  is an Institutional Repository of JUIT. It has been developed on DSpace Open  Source Software. It contains scanned copy of previous years question papers,  full-text of articles published under JUIT affiliation. It can be accessed at http://www.ir.juit.ac.in:8080/jspui/ Subscribed E-Resources: ASCE Digital Library (for Civil  Engineering & Material Sciences) - http://ascelibrary.org/ IEEExplore (for Computing and  Electronics) - http://ieeexplore.ieee.org Springer Online Journals (All areas of  Engineering) - https://link.springer.com/ SIAM e-Books (for Mathematics) - http://portal.igpublish.com/iglibrary/search/main?2 Other Open  Access Resources Shodhganga : One  can have open access to full-texts of Electronic Theses and Dissertations  submitted to Indian Universities. DSpace  @ MIT : Open access to full-texts of article collection of Massachusetts  Institute of Technology, JUIT LRC Web-OPAC :  One can explore catalogue of JUIT LRC. JUIT Publication Database : This is a  listing of JUIT research output in the form of articles, conferences, books,  chapters, proceedings, etc. Open Access Journals: This is the collection of quality journals in core areas of institute which are  available under open access over the Internet. Open Access E-Books : Project  Gutenberg offers over 53,000 free ebooks: choose among free epub books,  free kindle books, download them or read them online. Citation Style: EndNote Reference Management Software : EndNote is a desktop program that  helps researchers quickly collect and organize references from online sources. Zotero : Zotero is the only research tool that automatically  senses content in your web browser, allowing you to add it to your personal  library. Online Information Search: The LRC staff  has been getting frequent requests for arranging full-texts of various articles  which are not subscribed by the institute. To streamline the system, we have  come up with an ‘Online Information Search Request Form’, which is available at  circulation counter in the Library. Students need to get it signed from the  concerned faculty, so that LRC staff may devote their time for searching  authenticated requests only. The users  engaged in research work in the form of projects, paper writing etc can avail  this specialized service by filling up aforesaid form. Digital Library Digital Library  is an Institutional Repository of JUIT. It has been developed on DSpace Open  Source Software. It contains scanned copy of previous years question papers,  full-text of articles published under JUIT affiliation. It can be  accessed at http://172.16.73.104:8080/jspui/ Web OPAC: Catalogue of the  library collections, books, journals, magazines and other materials is  accessible online 24x7. One can know the list of books borrowed and their due  dates. IT enables speedy search of library catalogue. It also helps the  students to explore the facility of book reservation. It can be  accessed at http://172.16.73.16:8480/liberty/libraryHome.do JUIT Publication Database: The JUIT  publication is a specialized online database containing list of research output  of the University. The list is interlinked through profile of the individual  faculty, Department-wise and year wise as well. It can be  explored by visiting at http://www.juit.ac.in/JPubDB/
